titleStmt.title: SII 25.195: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 195. (A.R. No. 195 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantarapurīśvara temple.
This record is dated in the 20th regnal year, which with other details of date are Makara, śu 7, Monday, Aśvini-nakshatra •••

This inscription records the gift of land by the great assembly of Peruvāḻvutanda-perumāḷ-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu, in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, for the food offerings to be made to the deity Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam-uḍaiya-periya-nāchchiyar, set up by the prince Purōśaikkuḍaiyār. The gift was made for the welfare of the king and for the victory of the Prince Iruṅgōḷar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkara
vattikaḷ śrī Irācarāca cevaṟkku yā
ṇ(ṭ)ṭu Irupatāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pū
rvvapakkattu saptamiyum tiṅkaḷkkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ Irāce
ntira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai
nāṭṭu Akaram peruvāḻvutanta perumā
ṉ catuppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahā
sabhaiyār Eḻuttu . nammur kaṇakku mahājaṉap
piriyaṉum tan(m)mapiriyaṉum kaṇa(ṭ)ṭu perumāḷ tiru
meṉikalliyāṇa tirumeṉiyākavum piḷḷai Iruṅ�
koḷaṟkku vijaiyāttamākavum piḷḷai purocaik
kuṭaiyār cākkāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉic caruppeti ma
ṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār
koyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tirukkāmakoṭṭamuṭai
ya periyanācciyārkku Amutupaṭikkum cāttuppaṭi
kkum Uṭalāka tirukkaimalaril nirvāṟttu kuṭut
ta nilamāvatu . piṭākai koṟṟa nallūrāṉa te
vuntiruvumuṭaiya nallūr Ulokamātevi va
tikku meṟku viranārāyaṇavāykkālukku te
ṟkku Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu me
ṟkkaṭaiya nilam �kiḻakku mukkālmā vum Iraṇṭāñcatirattu
kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Āka nilam
Iṉnilam Aimāviṉ kiḻaraiyum I
ṉṉāḷ mutal nirvāṟttukkuṭuttamaiyil Iṉnila
ṅkaḷāl tarappaṭi varikaḷil Uḷḷa maṭakku kaḻittu Oḻuki
l Uḷḷa maṭakku
kaṭamaiyum kuṭimai
varikoḷḷum kari
kum niṉaippiṭṭu taṇṭum vaṟkkaṅkaḷum
kuṭimai koyiṟampapeṟu Uḷppaṭa Ūri
le Eṟaṭṭu Iṟukka kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi canti
rātittavaraiyumñ cellakkaṭavatākavum nicca
yittom . Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvate . paṇiyāl
Ūrkkaṇakku mahājaṉa piriyaṉ Eḻuttu karuṇākarapiriyaṉ
Eḻuttu cikiṭṭaṇapaṭṭasya vira Iraājentirap piramātarā
jasya kūṭal civakaṇapaṭṭasya terāḷipaṭṭasya nārāya
ṇa paṭṭasya cappāṇi paṭṭasya tiruveṅkaṭa paṭṭasya
Āṇṭa nampipaṭṭasya paṭṭasya
rakkoḷḷi paṭṭasya I paṭṭasya
yañjapaṭṭasya śrī vāsudevapaṭṭa
śveśvarapaṭṭasya yañjāmmi paṭṭasya
devapaṭṭasya Aiyyanampipaṭṭasya
kiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭasya vedasyā
Irācarācapaṭṭasya kecavapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai
nārāyaṇapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku
paṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai
ṇa paṭṭasya nārāyaṇapaṭṭasya Eḷāpaṭṭasya Akka paṭṭasya
cūriyatevapaṭṭasya śrī kruṣṇapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikkivai ko
maḷattu tirukkaṇṇapuramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭasya ve
paṭṭasya nārāyaṇapaṭṭasya cuntarattoḷuṭaiyāṉ pa
paṭṭasya śrī kruṣṇapaṭṭasya Itu tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa paṭṭasya
Ivai caṅkarapaṭṭasya śrī mātevapaṭṭasya śrīrāmapaṭṭasya
cūriyatevapaṭṭasya campupaṭṭasya yañjāmmi paṭṭasya
kuṭavāyil veṭakkūtta paṭṭasya vaṟṟal nārāyaṇa
paṭṭasya kurovi viṣṇupaṭṭasya ..
Digital edition of SII 25.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
